🖤Small LADY D-JOY Handbag in 'White Lambskin'
This Lady D-Joy handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black matte calfskin, it features a striking quilting detail created with classic diagonal quilting stitching, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. Matching metal D.I.O.R. charms add an elegant touch. The small size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Model: 9240
Size: 22 x 12 x 6 cm

❤️Mini size
This DioGroove 20 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is adorned with a Christian DioParis logo and embellished with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The bag can be opened with a zipper lock using the included key charm. The spacious compartment has a slip pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Model: 8808
Size: 16.5 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
